name: pi-redline
description_en: Redline pi sessions: an overlay TUI showing every file changed in the current pi session with syntax-highlighted diffs, per-line selection, fix/explain annotations, and a one-key submit-as-prompt flow.
description_zh: Redline pi会话：叠加TUI，显示当前pi会话中每个已更改的文件，带有语法高亮差异、逐行选择、修复/解释注释，以及一键提交为提示的流程。
